wiki.summary: Jane Remover’s sophomore album opens with Cage Girl / Cam Girl. Prior to this version of the track, 2 other iterations of it were released. On April 18, 2022, a low quality demo of this song would be posted on Soundcloud. Following this, Jane Remover would release a studio quality version with some differences as a side-B to her single “Royal Blue Walls”. The final and current version of the song is titled differently, with added lyrics, rerecorded vocals from the artist, and small production differences. Read more on Last.fm.
